extra.reason: Closed
Resolved: monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Mobile imports AppRouter type directly from broccoli-api/router — no package/submodule/codegen needed.
EAS project created and linked: @afrothundr/broccoli-mobile (id ab0e4d00-4e27-42b2-ac1f-aac132506845); projectId + owner written to app.json

Built email/password sign-in flow: SignIn component (sign-in/sign-up toggle, error handling) calling authClient.signIn.email/signUp.email; root _layout gates on authClient.useSession() -> SignIn vs AppTabs; home screen shows signed-in email + sign-out. Typechecks and lint-clean. End-to-end runtime against the API is verified on-device in o8h.5 (needs the dev build).
EAS Android development build produced and installed on a physical device (build 3d145866). Includes expo-dev-client + expo-network native module.
Verified on device: app boots, home shows broccoli-api connected (/health), email/password sign-in against deployed broccoli-api succeeds, signed-in user shown.
Phase 0 complete: Expo app scaffolded, EAS set up, Android dev build on device, sign-in against broccoli-api verified end to end.
Merged in PR #11; typecheck clean. Device pass covered by vqy.5.
Merged in PR #12. Device pass covered by vqy.5.
Review screen with inline edits verified on Android emulator against production: 16 Trader Joe's items rendered with categories, editable names/prices, live total. In PR #13.
Save via receipt.confirm verified on emulator: 'Saved — 16 items from TRADER JOE'S' with SAVED row in production Postgres. In PR #13.

Core loop verified end to end on Android emulator (library-photo path) against production api+model: sign-in, upload, parse, review, save. Physical-device camera pass still worth a spot-check (emulator camera is synthetic). Three bugs found+fixed during verification: Expo useSession refetch, RN blob upload path, shared rate-limit bucket (PR #13).
Phase 1 mobile epic done: a real receipt becomes a saved, corrected item list on a device.

Verified on emulator against local api: bananas 'check it' (past estimate), green beans + blackberries 'use soon' in Use-first section; ~16d/~9d chips on perishables; shelf-stable items chip-free (>30d suppressed); expanded detail names FoodKeeper.
Merged in PR #15 with freshness chips (8ww.4); verified on emulator.

Swipe deck verified on emulator against production: urgency-ordered 18-card deck, right-swipe EATEN via gesture, undo restored via unresolve, TOSSED via tap fallback; inventory refreshed without the tossed item on close.
Verified in the same emulator pass: saved receipt items in Inventory, check-in swipes + undo persisted to production Postgres, inventory self-updated after the deck.
Phase 2 mobile epic done: inventory + freshness grouping + daily check-in swipe deck, all verified on device against production.
Server expiresAt+source rendered in inventory chips and deck; legacy client fallback kept for pre-Phase-3 items; verified on emulator.
Adjust-date steppers (−1d/+1d/+3d/+1w) in item detail -> adjustExpiration; verified Jul 9 -> Jul 16 with 'set by you' source.
Pantry/Fridge/Freezer toggle -> setStorageLocation; verified recompute and the no-data edge (eggs -> Freezer keeps date, updates location).
Deck leads with EXPIRED items ('EXPIRED — did you eat it or toss it?'); verified expired tuna first of 4.
Emulator pass against local Phase 3 api: sourced chips, expired-first sections and deck, date adjust and location toggle round-trips all verified with screenshots.
Phase 3 mobile complete: sourced expirations, user corrections (date + location), expired-first check-in.
Dashboard zinc+green palette ported to theme.ts (light+dark) with primary/border/destructive tokens; hardcoded one-off colors swept (link blue, three error reds) to tokens.

Dashboard logo shipped into the app: sign-in wordmark, regenerated app icon / adaptive icon / monochrome / splash / favicon from the circular mark; splash+adaptive backgrounds off blue to white. Needs a dev-client rebuild to show icon/splash.
Geist loaded via @expo-google-fonts/geist + useFonts (expo-font native module already in the dev client); ThemedText maps type weights to Geist families with system fallback.

Shared Button (primary green / secondary) + Input (bordered, radius 8) adopted across sign-in, capture, review, inventory check-in, deck done state; three ad-hoc button styles and two input styles removed.

Emulator pass both themes: light and dark inventory screenshots verified (brand button, chips, Geist); dark uses zinc-900 cards + light-variant green. Bonus: prod scheduler sweep observed live (eggs expired).
Brand styling epic complete: tokens, brand assets, Geist, shared components, both themes verified.
Real ExponentPushToken issued on emulator (google-services.json baked in), registered with device timezone; graceful-failure paths in place.
Nudges card on Home verified: switch flipped nudgesEnabled in db via UI, quiet-hour steppers wired, optimistic updates.

Dev client rebuilt (FCM config + expo-notifications + brand icon). Verified: token issuance, registration row, settings round-trip, sweep sent to real token — Expo receipt shows InvalidCredentials: delivery blocked solely on FCM V1 service-account key upload to EAS (user step).
Phase 4 mobile complete; delivery gated only on the FCM V1 key upload.

Built and verified on emulator with multi-week seeded data, light+dark: tiles correct ($194.15/4 trips, $17.76/32%), chart renders validated colors, tap selection + latest-data-week default, loading spinner fix (empty-state no longer flashes during load).
